case_title: SKRUZNY VINCENT V. VS BANK OF AMERICA (ROSENBERG RICHARD) et al

docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
CERTIFIED MAIL TO RICHARD ROSENBERG RETURNED SIGNED.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SKRUZNY VINCENT V. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT BANK OF AMERICA (ROSENBERG RICHARD) NO RECORD THAT CHEMICAL BANK WAS EVER SERVED. CASE REMAINS OPEN AS TO CHEMICAL BANK, NEW YORK, NY STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,575.00 FILED BY SKRUZNY VINCENT V. AS TO DEFENDANT BANK OF AMERICA (ROSENBERG RICHARD) CHEMICAL BANK ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-01-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 08
